title: Service started after auth success, not after socket open
description: BackgroundService.start() is called only when the first RPC response (auth success) is received, not at socket connection time. This means the 'Relay connected' notification accurately reflects authenticated connectivity, not just TCP handshake. A future contributor might move the start() call earlier (e.g. to _doConnect) to 'simplify' it — that would be wrong because the notification would show 'connected' during auth and briefly during failed auth attempts.
close_reason: Design decisions recorded for reference; no code changes needed.
